prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约3653名→3650名→3270名→2831名→2641名，整体呈持续前移趋势，近3年累计前移约629名，2025年基准位次约2641名，竞争逐年加剧；该校在上海市招生计划：2021年15人、2022年24人、2023年21人、2024年22人、2025年22人；2026年计划19人，较2025年缩招3人（约-13.6%），缩招将加剧竞争，推动位次进一步前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安交通大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校（C9联盟成员），软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续稳居第10名，属于全国顶尖高校层次；2023年声誉偏负面（宿舍通勤问题），2024年偏负面（师德师风谣言，校方已澄清），2025–2026年声誉数据中未出现该校，整体舆情平稳；抖音热度总排名第24位（较热），综合热度约184万，短视频平台关注度较高，反映报考热度不低；第五轮学科评估中，动力工程及工程热物理、控制科学与工程、机械工程、电气工程获评A+，数学、材料科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、管理科学与工程、工商管理、力学获评A，电子科学与技术、生物医学工程获评A-，A类学科数量众多，工科实力极为突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业均为高热推荐，与西安交大王牌专业高度契合；上海市2026年考生总数约66700人（较2025年49276人增加约35%），省控线本科批近年稳定在400–405分区间，无明显波动；西安交通大学位于陕西省（西部），上海考生存在一定地域偏好，但作为C9顶尖高校，跨省吸引力依然强劲；该校在沪招生计划占比较小（约19–24人），属于小规模招生，位次波动对计划变化较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划缩招约13.6%、上海考生总数大幅增加以及学校顶尖层次与优势学科的强吸引力，预计2026年竞争将进一步加剧，位次在2025年基准2641名基础上继续前移。预测最低位次约2425名，区间2149–2701名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 人工智能（新工科卓越计划）
- 工科试验班（电气类）（电气工程及其自动化、能源互联网工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 储能科学与工程（新工科卓越计划）
- 工科试验班（越杰计划机类专业预选）（含机械工程、能源与动力工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（数学类）（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学）
- 自动化
- 微电子科学与工程
- 工科试验班（计算机科学技术类）（计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、物联网工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2425名，区间2149–2701名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主攻方向、一档适度冲刺、三档稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间上限（如进入2100名以内）可重点冲击人工智能、电气类等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（如2700名左右）建议以三档专业为主，确保录取。该校工科实力极强，电气、计算机、自动化等均为A+或A级学科，社会热度高，就业前景广阔。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 3653 → 3650 → 3270 → 2831 → 2641, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 629 places in the last 3 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2641, and competition is intensifying year by year. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai: 15 in 2021, 24 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 22 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 19, a reduction of 3 (about -13.6%) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and push rankings further upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xi'an Jiaotong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university (member of the C9 League). It has consistently ranked 10th in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, placing it among the top-tier universities nationwide. In 2023, its reputation was slightly negative (dormitory commuting issues); in 2024, slightly negative (rumors about teacher ethics, clarified by the university); from 2025 to 2026, no negative data appeared, indicating overall stable public opinion. Its Douyin heat ranking is 24th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive heat of about 1.84 million, reflecting high attention on short video platforms and considerable application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering were rated A+; Mathematics, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Management Science and Engineering, Business Administration, and Mechanics were rated A; Electronic Science and Technology, and Biomedical Engineering were rated A-. The university has a large number of A-level disciplines, with exceptionally strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended and align well with Xi'an Jiaotong University's flagship programs. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Shanghai is about 66,700 (an increase of about 35% from 49,276 in 2025). The provincial control line for the undergraduate batch has been stable in the 400–405 range in recent years, with no significant fluctuations. Xi'an Jiaotong University is located in Shaanxi Province (western China). Shanghai examinees have some geographical preferences, but as a top C9 university, its cross-provincial appeal remains strong. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai is relatively small (about 19–24 students), making it a small-scale enrollment, and ranking fluctuations are sensitive to plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the approximately 13.6% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase in the total number of Shanghai examinees, and the strong appeal of the university's top-tier status and advantageous disciplines, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026. The ranking is predicted to continue moving upward from the 2025 baseline of 2641. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2425, with a range of 2149–2701.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Excellence Program)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Electrical Category) (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Energy Internet Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Energy Storage Science and Engineering (New Engineering Excellence Program)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Yuejie Program Machine Major Pre-selection) (including Mechanical Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Pilot Class (Mathematics Category) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Automation
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering
- Engineering Pilot Class (Computer Science and Technology Category) (Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Internet of Things Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 2425, with a range of 2149–2701. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main direction, moderately aim for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 2100), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors like Artificial Intelligence and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (e.g., around 2700), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. The university has extremely strong engineering capabilities, with Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Automation being A+ or A-level disciplines, high social popularity, and broad employment prospects.
